title: T-104 — UI: FA Planning tab (fa_planning_tab) — schema-driven form
prompt:
# T-104 — FA Planning tab UI (slice of T-025)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §5.4 + UX fa_planning_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:537-557 (FAPlanningTab)
Parent root: T-025

## Goal
Client component for FA Planning dept rendering 3 fields (Meat %, Runs per week, Date codes per week) plus the Technical BOM v1 transition note. Tab is gated behind Core close (coreDone) — when Core not closed, tab is locked at the parent level (handled by T-105 wiring). Uses buildDeptZod('Planning') + updateFaCell per dirty field.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:537-557`
- closed_planning badge in card-head (Yes → green Closed badge, else gray Open)
- 3 fields in form-grid: Meat % (number, defaultValue fa.meat_pct), Runs per week (number), Date codes per week (text, e.g. 'Mon,Wed,Fri')
- Blue alert: 'When FA is launched it transitions to Technical BOM v1 adopted by the Planning module (see Planning / Products)'
- Save Planning + Close Planning section buttons

## Implementation contract
New `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/planning-tab.tsx` 'use client'. RHF + zodResolver(buildDeptZod('Planning')). Save calls `updateFaCell` per dirty field. Close Planning triggers deptClose modal via URL param. Tab assumes Core closed (parent gate is in T-105 wiring). shadcn Form/FormField/Input/Button/Alert primitives.

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/planning-tab.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/__tests__/planning-tab.test.tsx [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the Planning tab renders, when compared to fa-screens.jsx:537-557 (FAPlanningTab), then it shows the 3 fields (Meat %, Runs per week, Date codes per week) in correct order with closed_planning badge, the Technical BOM v1 blue Alert, and uses shadcn Form/FormField/Input/Alert primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given user changes Meat % and saves, when Server Action runs, then `updateFaCell` is called for `meat_pct` only and the DB row updates.
3. Given closed_planning='Yes', when rendered, then the closed badge shows in green and Save/Close buttons are still rendered (close gate is enforced by parent wiring not by this tab).
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 3 RTL tests for 3-field parity, single-field save (meat_pct), closed badge rendering.
- Run: `pnpm --filter web test planning-tab`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement other tabs in this slice
- Do not duplicate the field definitions (use buildDeptZod + DeptColumns)
- Do not implement the Core-close gate inside this tab (parent wiring handles it)
